Query how long to learn python
basic Python fundamentals. However, reaching professional job-readiness typically
months of dedicated learning and building projects. Reddit · r/learnpython
The exact timeline heavily depends on your experience level and goals: Basic
: You can learn variables, loops, and basic functions in just
a few days if you are already familiar with programming. Fundamentals & Data Structures
: Absolute beginners need a few months to grasp Object-Oriented Programming
and data structures like lists and dictionaries. Specialization
Applying Python to specific fields like web development
requires significant additional study . Reddit · r/learnpython
The fastest way to learn is by writing code every day and working on real-world
projects, rather than just reading about them. For tips on how to get your environment
set up and avoid common pitfalls when starting out:
